author: m1--track-driver-signing-key
content: Result: Kicked off GH #88 agent in worktree, agent implemented feature in 1 commit (10 files, 143 insertions). All 146 tests pass. Manual verification confirmed driver fingerprint appears in both intervention output and trust approval JSON. PR #109 opened. Also filed GH #110 for container-based agent execution epic based on architecture discussion with driver.
